name: Chicken with Green & Red Pepper
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------MARINADE-------------------------
1/2 cup Egg white
1 tbsp Soy sauce
1 tbsp Cornstarch paste
----------------------SEASONING SAUCE----------------------
2 tbsp Soy sauce
1/2 tbsp Wine
1/2 tsp Salt
1 tsp Sugar
1 tbsp Brown vinegar
1 tsp Cornstarch
1 tsp Sesame oil
Paste is equal amount of starch to water
I) Cut chicken into 1-inch cubes. Marinate for at least 1/2 hour.
II) Remove seeds and stems from peppers. Cut into one-inch squares. Slice garlic into circles.
III) Heat oil until boiling. Fry chicken for 1/2 minute. Remove from pan and drain oil.
IV) Using 2 tbsp oil, fry garlic until fragrant. Add peppers and quickly stir-fry for a few seconds. Add chicken and seasoning sauce. Stir until thick. Serve.
